description: Made of cotton elastane stretch fabric, providing superior comfort and flexibility Delightful lace trim that sits perfectly on the neckline Semi coverage moulded bra with soft seamless cups Soft tip underwire & double layered cups, for complete support & excellent lift Soft, detachable straps rest comfortably on shoulders & leave no marks on your skin Also comes with transparent straps Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
